desc: Alina fell asleep in the moonlit garden. In her dream, she sauntered around the lake with flowers like a skylark.

name: Frosted Paradise
desc: Smoothing the coat's little bows before handing it to Nikki. Details make or break an outfit.

name: White Devotion
desc: Beneath the radiant dome, prayers rose for salvation. Isua blessed them, trusting the sanctuary would protect all.

name: Hope in White
desc: Fundraising in town, Isua soon gained a patron. With Lainie, she built the first shelter—then a second, a third...

name: Nocturne Garden
desc: Her immense power turned desire into reality—when she awoke, moonlight bathed a silent sea of blooms.

name: Crimson Thread Song
desc: Moonlight had sharpened into thorns as the veiled witch appeared—'Was it you who disturbed my garden?'

name: Pink Lotus Whispers
desc: Morning mist lingers in mountain; dew rests on lotus leaves. A small boat glides through the green curtains of lotus.

name: Warm Waiting
desc: The bell rings as the door opens. Icy snowflakes slip into the shop, soon melting in the warmth.

name: Warm Waiting - Coffee
desc: Capri resists giving in to pressure, but worry weighs on her, blocking her creative flow.

name: Warm Waiting - Cheese
desc: Capri spends all day in the library, seeking knowledge and inspiration to perfect her designs.

name: Dazzling Vogue
desc: A notification flashed: she had been granted twenty minutes to return from the testing center to her quarters.

name: Dazzling Vogue - Silence
desc: Xuni giggled, releasing her hands. She never disturbed Heimdal in this way. This was their unique way of greeting.

name: Shrouded in Mist
desc: A wandering scholar traveled the famed mountains and rivers with only ink and paper, vowing to record all legends.

name: Blossoms in the Woods
desc: Sunlight spilled through clouds, casting shifting patterns. The warm breeze brought drowsiness and tranquility.

name: Riding the Wind
desc: Inform the mayor. Lunar has returned!' The messenger's heart sank as he catched a glimpse of her grave expression.

name: Frostland Dawn
desc: Patrolling soldiers passed unnoticed. The alliance took the city days ago but left civilian life undisturbed.

name: Frostland Dawn - Triumph
desc: Louie sat at the bar, gaze lowered to the wooden table. His eyes lay hidden in shadow, clouded with gloom.

name: Wild's Whisper
desc: The wind carried scents of sand, streams, and poplars, as if nature itself were telling an ancient story.

name: Abyssal Ink
desc: One day, a curious girl snuck to the shore, dipping her hands into the cold sea, giggling at the strange sensation.

name: Plumed Wisdom
desc: The feather of a special bird in Qingqiu is said to keep one from being tricked, so many came to steal bird feathers.

name: Cool Signal
desc: Cool waves lapped at her ankles again. Bebena sipped her icy drink, then felt a soft tap against her foot.

name: Celestial Wings
desc: Melutin grew up in a small town in Apple Federation. Life was simple, but music brought her joy and comfort.

name: Wayward Zephyr
desc: The spirit foxes stayed in Qingqiu, hidden by its mist—few saw the life it quietly held.

name: Galaxy Glitter
desc: The theater darkens as the audience gazes into a river of stars. The title The Gilded Road slowly appears on the screen.

name: Ripple Dance
desc: The stream was Dalf's favorite. She often played with the water creatures and listened to their stories.

name: Radiant Phantom
desc: Beyond food and sleep, she lived in the script, shaping a thief of wit, charm, and allure.

name: First Snow Diary
desc: Red maples line the mountain road. Their colors mix with the silent pine green, brightening the season.

name: Creed of Witch
desc: As more strange figures gather behind, Kuro hums a tuneless song, striding forward and giving life to the silent city.

name: Security Chip
desc: Before all traces vanish, tiny information fragments may be pieced together by malicious hands, sparking a war.

name: Connection Path
desc: When the enemy attempts to link with the center again, Norsen's planted virus triggers, severing all connections.

name: Kingdom's Secret
desc: A cold blade slices a line of light in the dark. Riene, legion commander, faces the darkness alone for the gem.

name: Flawless Dreamland
desc: The buildings follow typical human city styles, but the residents are bizarrely shaped monsters, not humans.

name: Harvest Wish
desc: Loxie lifts her skirt and hums, walking to the fields. Her basket carries the joy and hopes of harvest season.

name: Dreamlike Moment
desc: The final shot freezes as the curtain falls. Filming wraps, and the haze in Ivanna's eyes quietly fades away.

name: Whims Come True
desc: Could it really be that magical? She hesitates but submits her reservation and receives a letter from the studio.

name: Whims Come True - Dream
desc: Green grass, sparkling lake, and the scent of flowers everywhere. The tale must take place in a scene like this.

name: Tranquil Verses
desc: Overjoyed, she rereads the letter and unfolds the blank paper, eager to write down her dreams and wishes.

name: Tranquil Verses - Berry
desc: Though she's never been here, everything feels familiar to her, every detail matching her imagination.

name: Thoughts on Life
desc: The studio, famed for 'realizing any dream,' offers flawless service, impressing even the most exacting guests.

name: Thoughts on Life - Violet
desc: Inside her shawl, she discovers an embroidery titled 'Fleeting Life', indicating the sign of this dreamy journey.

name: Phantasmal Glow
desc: The studio weaves countless dreams. After deep thought, Gloria writes the theme: 'Dance with Muse.'

name: Sunlit Wave Melody
desc: To her, life feels like a silent deep pool. Even standing before the studio, she shows little interest.

name: Gentle Sunlight
desc: Erin is a traveler. At each new stop she mails postcards back home, sometimes with a leaf, sometimes a dried flower.

name: Velvet Whispers
desc: One spring afternoon, a friend sends a mysterious poster, promising a photo studio that would meet Ava's hopes.

name: Rosy Cloudlight
desc: Under dewy petals lies a delicately scented note. Momo nods proudly before tiptoeing out of the room.

name: Crane from Moon
desc: The qin sounds drift from noon to dusk, but Lin Yao does not appear. A quiet loneliness fills her heart.

name: Scattered Jewels
desc: Lin Yao arrives on time. After years apart, they perform together again, but their harmony has faded.

name: Crystal Reverie
desc: Warmth makes her drowsy. She lowers her fairytale book. As it falls on the ground, a spark of starlight leaps out.

name: Blazing Bloom
desc: Tessa adored it. Gazing into the tiny world, she whispered to the dancing doll, 'From now on, you'll be Snowy.'

name: Clearheart Melody
desc: Tessa no longer feared being different. She faced the world with courage, guided by music and the warmth of love.

name: Blessed Lucky Wish
desc: Every March, the valley hosts a lively festival. Barrels of fine wine are shared as people toast the arrival of spring.

name: Hymn of Good Fortune
desc: Golden liquid swirls in cups, grain scents intoxicate the air. Maxie sips the brew and smiles, pleased by its fresh taste.

name: Gentle Morning Breeze
desc: It is a cute little bunny, watching in awe as it hops closer to her. Elno smiles, careful not to startle the tiny spirit of nature.

name: Neon in the Rain
desc: Beneath the glory, threats persist. Morton is ordered to capture an ex-official stealing intel and planning to defect.

name: Glory of Past
desc: She stands before the old theater, hearing echoes of past songs. Her uncle's life's work now faces closure.

name: Moonlight Serenade
desc: Ribbon with shimmer like shiny moonlight.
